# StdioClientTransportOptions.OnInflightLost property

A callback invoked with the ids of in-flight requests lost on an unexpected exit, so the caller MAY retry them against the fresh process (spec §8.6.4-b).

```csharp
public Action<IReadOnlyList<RequestId>>? OnInflightLost { get; set; }
```
